data: {"generalSituation":"The area of low pressure over the northern part of the South China Sea will edge closer to the coast of Guangdong today. There will be heavy showers, thunderstorms and squalls over the region today and tomorrow. An active southwesterly airstream is expected to affect the coast of Guangdong in the middle and latter parts of this week to early next week. There will be sunny intervals, showers and thunderstorms over the region. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Haishen will move across the western North Pacific in the next couple of days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260714","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and squally thunderstorms.
